category_sources: Official homepage describes eless as A Better less.
source_facts.description says it is a better less using Emacs view-mode and Bash.
docs_sources: Official homepage notes that the script and documentation are generated from the same source.
source_facts.homepage is the official eless documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kaushalmodi/eless; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies less, Emacs view-mode, and Bash.
